title: gordonia huongiana
intro: Gordonia huongiana is a medicinal plant native to Vietnam, also known as Phai Cat Linh or Cat Linh, which belongs to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Vietnamese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Gordonia huongiana has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make medicinal tonics and remedies.
